code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut cur = ""
mut have = false
mut max_v = 0
mut min_v = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  mut b = 0
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
    end
  else
    is_ws = true
  end

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if not have
          max_v = v
          min_v = v
          have = true
        else
          if v > max_v
            max_v = v
          end
          if v < min_v
            min_v = v
          end
        end
      when None
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("max=#{max_v}")
println("min=#{min_v}")
